hero.subtitle: Connect systems. Automate workflows. Scale faster.

problem.item1Desc: Data scattered across dozens of apps. No single source of truth.
problem.item2Desc: Monolithic systems that can't adapt to how you work today.
problem.item3Desc: Repetitive tasks that slow growth and burn out teams.

products.title: Products
products.crmDesc: Relationships and pipeline in one place. One source of truth for every customer.
products.salesDesc: Deals, quotes, and forecasting. Close more with less manual work.
products.billingDesc: Invoicing and revenue recognition. Get paid faster, report accurately.
products.automationDesc: Workflows that run without you. Connect steps and remove bottlenecks.
products.integrationsDesc: Connect any system, any API. Your stack stays in sync.
products.analyticsDesc: Single source of truth across ops. See what matters in one place.

architecture.title: How it works
architecture.subtitle: Three steps to one unified operations platform.
architecture.step1Desc: Bring your existing systems and data into one place.
architecture.step2Desc: One operations layer. No more silos or duplicate data.
architecture.step3Desc: Workflows that scale with you and run without manual steps.

benefits.title: Key benefits
benefits.item1: One platform for CRM, sales, billing, and operations
benefits.item2: Connect legacy systems and modern tools in one place
benefits.item3: Automate workflows and reduce manual work
benefits.item4: Single source of truth for data and reporting

testimonials.quote1: Finally, one place for our operations. We scaled without the usual chaos.
testimonials.quote2: We connected legacy ERP and modern tools in weeks, not months.

cta.headline: Start running your operations on one modern platform.
